Index.recruitingSub: Want to join the team behind the magic? Applications are open!
Index.villageSuccess: 🎉 The International Village 2026 was a great success — thank you all for being there!
Index.villageIntro: The final stretch of the year is here… and with it, the most iconic (and most awaited) international event at Télécom. It's the moment to share, discover, and enjoy all the amazing cultures at Télécom — especially the food 😋
Index.villageMiss: You don't want to miss this! 🙅‍♀️
Index.villageRegistration: ⚠️ Registrations open Monday at 1 PM. It's free but mandatory (names will be checked at the entrance).
Index.villageInvite: You can invite your friends from other IP Paris schools, just make sure they register. Don't forget to bring your lunch box, eco-cup, and your own cutlery ♻️🍴
Index.villageHighlightsIntro: Plenty of stands to keep you entertained all night:
Index.villageSurprise: 🤭 And many more surprises we're keeping secret for now…
Index.villageClosing: We can't wait to see you there! 😎
Index.aboutSub: The association that makes diversity shine ✨
Index.aboutText: The <highlight>BDI</highlight> (Bureau Des Internationaux) is the international students' association at <highlight>Telecom Paris</highlight>. Our mission: making every international student a true part of the community, through cultural events, gatherings and lots of love. 💛
Index.footerSub: Join the BDI family on Instagram

Missions.mission1Desc: We support you from day one so you feel at home.
Missions.mission2Desc: Celebrating every culture is our specialty.
Missions.mission3Desc: Learn a language, share yours, connect.
Missions.mission4Desc: Parties, dinners, festivals that create lasting memories.
Missions.mission5Desc: French or international, we're all in this together.

Events.event1Desc: Our flagship event: a multicultural festival with booths, world cuisine and performances.
Events.event2Desc: A shared iftar to celebrate Ramadan together.
Events.event3Desc: Intercultural conversations to better understand each other.
Events.event4Desc: The most international party of the year!
Events.event5Desc: A warm Christmas dinner for the whole community.
Events.event6Desc: We welcome the new year together.
Events.event7Desc: A colorful and festive cultural festival.
